entries.source: What achievement system should we design?
entries.value: Pa system gyflawniadau ddylen ni ei dylunio?

entries.source: Create badges for consistency, mastery, courage, revision, collaboration, and finished artifacts.
entries.value: Creu bathodynnau ar gyfer cysondeb, meistrolaeth, dewrder, adolygu, cydweithio ac arteffactau gorffenedig.

entries.source: Learners exploring gamification topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Dysgwyr sy'n archwilio pynciau gêmeiddio ac sydd eisiau arweiniad ymarferol yn lle blwch ateb generig.

entries.source: This mode is tuned for badges & achievements with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Mae'r modd hwn wedi'i deilwra ar gyfer bathodynnau a chyflawniadau, gyda phromptiau, enghreifftiau a llif dysgu pwrpasol.

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal

entries.value: Creu bathodynnau ar gyfer fy nosbarth

entries.source: Create fair leaderboards that reward effort, improvement, teamwork, or consistency without discouraging slower learners.
entries.value: Creu byrddau arweinwyr teg sy'n gwobrwyo ymdrech, gwelliant, gwaith tîm neu gysondeb heb ddigalonni dysgwyr sy'n symud yn arafach.
Beth ddylai'r bwrdd arweinwyr ei fesur?

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal
Build check-ins that keep you moving
entries.value: Creu sesiynau gwirio sy'n eich cadw i symud ymlaen

entries.source: Create accountability check-ins with clear commitments, proof, recovery rules, and supportive follow-up.
entries.value: Creu sesiynau gwirio atebolrwydd gydag ymrwymiadau clir, tystiolaeth, rheolau adfer a dilyniant cefnogol.
